feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EXTWG missing Check Table TWEW in KOMG/KOMP — no F4 in VK11
entry.content: Field EXTWG in table MARA has Check Table TWEW assigned. However, the same field in pricing communication structures KOMG and KOMP does not have Check Table TWEW assigned. As a result, no F4 search help is available for field EXTWG when maintaining condition records in VK11 for custom condition table 746.

entry.title: spool error
entry.content:
SAP spool error log
      =====================

Print request processing log


The operating system is reporting problems

entry.title: Clarification on Support for browser-based PI sheet in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

This discussion is in continuation of the previous incident 766761/2026 – Clarification on Support of ABAP List-Based PI Sheets in SAP S/4HANA.

Currently, we are using ABAP-based PI sheets and are planning to migrate to browser-based PI sheets (Control Recipe Destination Type 4) as part of our digital transformation initiative from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA.

We would like to understand the following:

  1. Details regarding SAP support for browser-based PI sheets with process instructions in S/4HANA.
  2. Whether SAP has defined any timeline or roadmap indicating until when browser-based PI sheets will be supported.

Your guidance will help us plan our migration strategy effectively.

Thanks & Regards

Ashwin

entry.title: V.02 incomplete document
entry.content: Need to complete sales orders which have incompleteness with Shipping point and net value as the feilds are greyed out in VA02 so we are not able to complete the orders.

entry.title: Error BS002 – "Unlock" is not allowed when attempting to unlock Network in CJ20N
entry.content:
During project maintenance activities in SAP Project System (PS), an error occurs when attempting to remove the lock from a network object associated with a WBS element. The system returns the following message:

BS002 – "Unlock" is not allowed (NWA 1000010741 0010) This error prevents the execution of the unlock function, blocking further project processing activities.

entry.title: Delivery deletion
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a query related to delivery deletion, as the delivery is created with 0 qty picked and goods issue was done after checking the status it is showing completed therefore it does not go to EWM team also checked and try to vl09 but not able to reverse the pgi 

 

Please help and provide resolutions regarding this

 

 

Regards

Jain

entry.title: Exchange rate issue
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We are implementing India Localization and facing issue related to Exchange rate.

When we are creating Proforma Invoice may be on date 01.06.2026 and exchange rate as M type is maintained that day if it was 90 and after post goods issue we created ZF2 billing type may be on 15.06.2026 and exchange rate changed to 92 then we will have issue in Tax assesable value.

As per requirement we want to prevent it and get exchange rate to be copied from proforma invoice at header level.

is there any way to prevent this as part of India requirement that exchange rate copied from proforma Invoice

entry.title: Material V-GW_PREMIUM does not exist in storage location 2001 VO
entry.content:
Hi,

After upgrade to EHP8 from EHP0 in PDP/QDP,  a Service material V-GW_PREMIUM is giving error that it's not extended to a storage location. where item category is TAX.

For this material General plant data/Storage 1 isn't maintained before or after upgrade but after upgrade we face the error while creating the material

but the same material we are able to create a order in QDX (non upgraded sandbox) this material doesn't have the entry in MARD.

entry.title: How to add PROJ-STSPD field to the ALV output of transaction CN42N (program RPSISPD000)?
entry.content:
In transaction CN42N (program RPSISPD000), I need to display field PROJ-STSPD in the ALV output.

The report uses structure PROJI as the output structure, but PROJI does not contain field STSPD. It does contain customer include CI_PROJI, however I would like to avoid adding a Z field there and would prefer to use the standard field PROJ-STSPD directly.

Has anyone implemented this requirement before? Is there a standard enhancement spot, customer exit, BAdI, or customizing option that allows exposing a standard field from PROJ in the CN42N ALV output without modifying PROJI or adding a custom field to CI_PROJI?

entry.title: Country specific enhancement field in BP master data.
entry.content: We need to add Vendor: Counry-Spec.Enh.' and 'Vendor: Counry-Spec.Enh.2' tabs in BP master data. I have added LIV001, LIV002 and LIV003 in transaction BUS5 but still I am not able to see the Vendor: Counry-Spec.Enh.' and 'Vendor: Counry-Spec.Enh.2' tabs in BP master data.

entry.title: Default CGI node ScvLvl NURG
entry.content:
The default for the node ScvLvl should be NURG according to CGI V9 Rules in case of non SEPA payments.

But to archieve this we have to maintain instructions keys. We need NURG without instruction keys as a default.

entry.title: RCATSTPS performance improvement
entry.content:
What are the options to improve the performance of program RCATSTPS? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Statistical Moving Average Price
entry.content: In PRD environment customization under Material Management /General settings Material Management/ Set Material block for goods movement --> here material block has been set as late lock, Clarification what we need here is - as per the SAP note 2338387/2267835 functionality of statistical MAP has to be deactivated. In order to improve the system performance by enabling the late lock Mechanism. Does it in mean our current ECC SAP PRD environment has Statistical MAP has been deactivated?

entry.title: Reallocation cycle in allocating to Overheads line
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are facing issue with Reallocation cycle in allocating to Overheads line under tcode GR55 for company code 0716 where as under Company code 071C its working fine.

Find the enclosed document along with screenshot.

this overhead line should show amount Zero, which is not appearing in the report.

Regards,

Ramadevi

entry.title: Clean Code Level C – Business Partner Object
entry.content:
Hi,

we want to enhance existing legacy coding of our vendor solutions to be compliant with clean code level C.
Our problem mainly exists in old EHP systems.
We want to use the new object CL_MDBPCVI_READER instead of BAPI_BUPA_FS_TREASURY.
Additionally, using the API API_BUSINESS_PARTNER in S/4HANA system works, but not in EHP7/8 systems.

Is there a way to get our coding compliant to clean code level C also in older systems such as EHP7/8?

Many thanks,
Nils

entry.title: UAE eInvoicing - Company Code set up for Group Tax entities - VAT TRN & Additional Parameters
entry.content:
We have 2 UAE INTRA-GROUP company codes with same UAE VAT Group Tax Registration Number TRN. Example 100111111100001 

These 2 company codes have different UAE VAT Corporate Tax TRNs and TINs.

UAE VAT Group Tax Registration Number TRN 100111111100001

Company Code UAE1:

  • UAE VAT Corporate Tax TRN 100222222200002
  • TIN 1002222222
  • Trade License 444

Company Code UAE2:

  • UAE VAT Corporate Tax TRN 100333333300003
  • TIN 1003333333
  • Trade License 555

 

Question for T001-STCEG for each company code

In T001/STCEG we have maintained so far:  

  • UAE1 – 100111111100001  (for some reason we have maintained the Group Tax TRN in the initial GoLive a few years ago).
  • UAE2 – empty (for some reason we have maintained value empty in the initial GoLive a few years ago).

For the eInvoicing implementation, should we adjust them accordingly to:

  • UAE1 - 100222222200002 ?
  • UAE2 – 100333333300003 ?

 

Information for Parameter Types in Company Codes

Parameter types should be as follows based on:

Maintaining Additional Parameters for Company Code | SAP Help Portal

UAE1

  • AELRID – TL:444
  • AELRAC – ie. Dubai Integrated Economic Zones Authority
  • SAPAE1 (TIN) - 1002222222

UAE2

  • AELRID – TL:555
  • AELRAC – ie. Dubai Integrated Economic Zones Authority
  • SAPAE1 (TIN) - 1003333333

Reference: Page 22 of Webinar 2 presentation (9.4.2026)

SAP UAE eInviocing - webinar -April 9 2026.pdf

entry.title: Idoc error
entry.content: On an intercompany invoice idoc errors and says delivery does not exist

entry.title: V_EDSDC recording routine changed after upgrade
entry.content:
Dear Experts. 

After system upgrade, we have noticed, that the view V_EDSDC has been changed to use the "Standard recording routine". As a result, it now strictly requires a customizing transport request whenever a change is made.

Do you have any idea what can be done do revert this setting and be able to manage data without transport?

I have found something about changing the 'Current Settings' in the SOBJ.
But will it work for non-production environments? According to the SAP Help, it only works in production clients.

We need to be able to change the data without transport throughout the entire landscape (including DEV and QA).

Thank you very much for any help.  It will be appreciated 😊👍
Veronika

entry.title: Article in POD status is ECC has to be cleared. (290202)
entry.content:
Article ADR80680282  shows a quantity in ECC in storage bin POD.

There is no open Deliveries and the last movement on this article was 12-15-2016.

Our goal is,  to have this Article for a quantity of 2 removed from ECC completely from Site 8005.
This is not even an active SKU anymore.

entry.title: Change in the sender email id while sending payment advice to vendors in payment run F110.
entry.content:
We would like to change the sender email address used while sending Payment Advice emails to vendors.

Currently, the sender email ID is being picked up from the user who executes the payment run. However, our requirement is to send all Payment Advice emails from a default/common email ID irrespective of the user performing the payment run.

Kindly advise the necessary steps or settings required to achieve the same.
